ab: ulra i ruma’ i temu na vavayan?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: ulra, ulra alrupe’ i ki’edengan.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: ulra i ruma’ i temu na vavayan?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: uniyan, mupacalan lra haremay, uwaruma’ nu ’aremeng lra.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: ulra i ruma’ i temu na ma’inay?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: ulra i icas kana ki’edengan uwa aya’u intaw.
ch: B:他在上面的房間，你上去找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: ulra cau i ruma’?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: mau i Amsing kuwayu! sawaliyan ta lra adi marepana’u, ’inava u diya?
ch: B:原來是Amsing阿，很久沒有看到你了，你還好嗎?
en: It’s Amsing. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: ’inava ku, duwa ku maya’a kannu kimadayar.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: ulra i iyan i temama?
en: Where is your father?

ab: ulra i sawka semareser da kulang.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: mukuwa i iyan i Muymuy?
en: Where did Muymuy go?

ab: mukuwa i puvuyuwan ’emvanga da vuyu.
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: imu, duwa mi lra.
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: uniyan i temu, ulra i ’uma, ngarayu intaw kani a!
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在，他在田裡，你們在這等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: ama duwa u lra?
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: sawariyan ta lra adi mena’u kannu, tihasar u lra.
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: semangal ta mena’u kannu.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: vaveray kannu ini na re’a, ca’ani i lralritekan.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: sawaliyan u lra adi duwa, kuwa su’uraw na rinuma’enan, mukasaya ta mekan.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我來召集親戚，讓我們一起吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: amana mavangavang, ’emau ku diya da ’a’awan maruwa lra, kayta i kalisuwasuwan madayara.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: semangalan lrayuwan kananu sinadaru, avuruk ku lra.
ch: B:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: cinuwakan haremay ini na vuyu, adayu demeru.
ch: A:這隻雞剛殺好，帶回去煮。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
